summary: Lower memory footprint during scans, unified System Optimization hub, and live disk free-space badges in the sidebar.
introduced: System Optimization — Memory Analyzer and System Status combined into one hub for health, memory, and AI recommendations
Sidebar score badges — Disk shows HD (free space) and System Optimization shows Health (score) and Mem (percent) with color thresholds
changed: Duplicate groups load preview paths only; full member lists load when you preview cleanup
Scan index writes stream in batches and release SQLite cache after heavy work
AI storage analysis caps in-memory file samples at 25,000 instead of 500,000
Memory Analyzer retains fewer background samples and runs periodic AI every 10 minutes
Apple Intelligence memory insights use formatted markdown with clearer paragraph spacing
fixed: Reduced idle RAM after scans by clearing cached category files and duplicate reloads mid-scan
